Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels

Class DashboardPanelFX.Row

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.DashboardPanelFX.Row
Enclosing class:
DashboardPanelFX
private static class DashboardPanelFX.Row extends Object
Represents a single row of data to be displayed in the dashboard's transaction table. This class uses JavaFX properties (StringProperty, ObjectProperty) to enable data binding with TableView columns. It wraps an AccountingTransaction and includes calculated amount and running balance relevant to the displayed context.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<BigDecimal>
    amount
    The amount of this transaction entry relevant to the current view (e.g., total debit/credit).
    (package private) final javafx.beans.property.ObjectProperty<BigDecimal>
    balance
    The running balance after this transaction.
    (package private) final javafx.beans.property.StringProperty
    date
    The date of the transaction.
    (package private) final javafx.beans.property.StringProperty
    desc
    The description of the transaction.
    (package private) final javafx.beans.property.StringProperty
    memo
    The memo associated with the transaction.

    • date

      final javafx.beans.property.StringProperty date
      The date of the transaction.

      final javafx.beans.property.StringProperty desc

  • Constructor Details

    • Row

      Row(AccountingTransaction t, BigDecimal amt, BigDecimal bal)
      Constructs a new Row for display in the transaction table.
      Parameters:
      t - The source AccountingTransaction from which to derive row data.
      amt - The specific amount to display for this transaction in the current context (e.g., total amount of the transaction).
      bal - The running balance calculated up to and including this transaction.
